description.value:
Send Prescription processing zonodig building blocks for patient G. XXX_Hemsbergen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 6 Zo nodig Zo nodig
Send Prescription processing zonodig resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '202681') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3956') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '12548') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '373784005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '202681') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3956') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '12548') ))).where((quantity.value = 14)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '202681|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ASPIRINE TABLET 100MG)
